{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Software Developer",
  "description": "Rihsparkles People Consult (RihPCo) - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Garki, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	Our client is looking to hire a talented and innovative Full-Stack Software Developer to design, develop, and maintain high-performance web applications and digital solutions.
	The ideal candidate is a seasoned developer with strong command of both front-end and back-end technologies, a passion for clean code, and the ability to translate complex business requirements into elegant technical solutions.
	You will play a key role in building scalable digital products that power the organisation&#39;s service delivery.


Key Responsibilties


	Design, develop, test, and deploy scalable full-stack web applications using modern frameworks and best practices.
	Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code across front-end (HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Vue.js) and back-end (Node.js, Python, PHP, or Java) technologies.
	Collaborate with UI/UX designers to translate wireframes and design mockups into responsive, high-quality interfaces.
	Develop and manage RESTful APIs and integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and external data sources.
	Develop automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform.
	Design and maintain relational and non-relational databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
	Conduct thorough code reviews, unit testing, and debugging to ensure optimal application performance and reliability.
	Implement security best practices including data encryption, authentication (JWT/OAuth), and input validation.
	Manage version control using Git (GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket) and work within an Agile/Scrum development environment.
	Contribute to the technical architecture, system design, and infrastructure planning of key projects.
	Monitor application performance, identify bottlenecks, and optimize for speed, scalability, and user experience.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product managers, QA engineers, and business stakeholders.
	Stay abreast of emerging technologies and proactively propose improvements or new tools to enhance the development process.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree (BSc.) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field &mdash; required.
	Minimum of 5 &ndash;7 years of hands-on full-stack development experience with a proven delivery record.
	Master&#39;s Degree in a related discipline &mdash; an added advantage.
	Relevant certifications (AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure, Meta Developer, etc.) &mdash; a strong advantage.
	Experience developing automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform.
	Strong proficiency in front-end technologies: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/TypeScript, React.js or Vue.js.
	Solid experience with back-end frameworks: Node.js (Express), Python (Django/FastAPI), or PHP (Laravel).
	Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure), Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.
	Strong understanding of software architecture patterns (MVC, microservices, event-driven architecture).
	Excellent problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to deliver under deadline pressure. Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.


Portfolio and Achievement Requirements
Candidates must submit a comprehensive technical portfolio that includes:


	GitHub profile or repository links showcasing personal and professional projects.
	Live-deployed applications or products the candidate has contributed to or led.

Software Developer Job at Rihsparkles People Consult




        
    

        
        Rihsparkles People Consult (RihPCo) - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Developer

Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is looking to hire a talented and innovative Full-Stack Software Developer to design, develop, and maintain high-performance web applications and digital solutions.
	The ideal candidate is a seasoned developer with strong command of both front-end and back-end technologies, a passion for clean code, and the ability to translate complex business requirements into elegant technical solutions.
	You will play a key role in building scalable digital products that power the organisation's service delivery.


Key Responsibilties


	Design, develop, test, and deploy scalable full-stack web applications using modern frameworks and best practices.
	Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code across front-end (HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Vue.js) and back-end (Node.js, Python, PHP, or Java) technologies.
	Collaborate with UI/UX designers to translate wireframes and design mockups into responsive, high-quality interfaces.
	Develop and manage RESTful APIs and integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and external data sources.
	Develop automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform.
	Design and maintain relational and non-relational databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
	Conduct thorough code reviews, unit testing, and debugging to ensure optimal application performance and reliability.
	Implement security best practices including data encryption, authentication (JWT/OAuth), and input validation.
	Manage version control using Git (GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket) and work within an Agile/Scrum development environment.
	Contribute to the technical architecture, system design, and infrastructure planning of key projects.
	Monitor application performance, identify bottlenecks, and optimize for speed, scalability, and user experience.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product managers, QA engineers, and business stakeholders.
	Stay abreast of emerging technologies and proactively propose improvements or new tools to enhance the development process.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree (BSc.) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field — required.
	Minimum of 5 –7 years of hands-on full-stack development experience with a proven delivery record.
	Master's Degree in a related discipline — an added advantage.
	Relevant certifications (AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure, Meta Developer, etc.) — a strong advantage.
	Experience developing automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform.
	Strong proficiency in front-end technologies: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/TypeScript, React.js or Vue.js.
	Solid experience with back-end frameworks: Node.js (Express), Python (Django/FastAPI), or PHP (Laravel).
	Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure), Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.
	Strong understanding of software architecture patterns (MVC, microservices, event-driven architecture).
	Excellent problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to deliver under deadline pressure. Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.


Portfolio and Achievement Requirements
Candidates must submit a comprehensive technical portfolio that includes:


	GitHub profile or repository links showcasing personal and professional projects.
	Live-deployed applications or products the candidate has contributed to or led.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Senior Executive Assistant Job at HanaMera Recruitment and Consulting Services
content:
HanaMera Recruitment and Consulting Services - Our client, ITScope Solutions is a forward-thinking IT consulting firm that partners with businesses to navigate complex technology landscapes and drive meaningful digital transformation. We empower organizations with innovative, practical solutions that improve efficiency, unlock growth, and create lasting competitive advantage. Our focus is simple: ensuring technology works as a strategic enabler—not a barrier, to business success.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Executive Assistant

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid – In-Person & Remote)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	We are seeking a Senior Executive Assistant / Chief of Staff to work directly with the CEO. This is a high-impact role for someone who can function as a true extension of the executive—owning priorities, driving execution, and representing the CEO in high-stakes internal and external engagements.


What You’ll Be Doing


	Act as a strategic partner to the CEO, managing priorities, time, and focus
	Represent the CEO in high-level meetings, stakeholder engagements, and decision-making forums
	Drive follow-through on key initiatives, ensuring alignment across teams
	Anticipate business needs, risks, and opportunities—proactively solving problems at an executive level
	Manage executive communications, including emails, reports, and stakeholder correspondence
	Coordinate and lead meetings where required, track action points, and ensure execution
	Oversee cross-functional projects and ensure timely delivery of strategic goals
	Bring structure, clarity, and operational excellence to a fast-paced environment.


What We’re Looking For


	Proven experience as a Senior Executive Assistant, Chief of Staff, or similar executive-level support role (non-negotiable)
	Demonstrated experience supporting C-suite executives or founders
	Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills
	Strong business acumen, critical thinking, and decision-making ability
	High level of discretion, professionalism, and emotional intelligence
	Ability to operate independently with minimal supervision
	Strong organizational and project management skills
	Tech-savvy with the ability to quickly adapt to tools and systems.


What Sets You Apart


	You think and operate like an executive, not just a support function
	You are trusted to represent leadership in high-stakes situations
	You anticipate and solve problems before they surface
	You bring structure and clarity to ambiguity
	You are calm, decisive, and solutions-driven under pressure.


Compensation


	Competitive (based on experience, capability, and impact).


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief note explaining a situation where you took ownership of a high-impact challenge and delivered results without being instructed to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Infitech Global Solutions is a leading information technology company that focuses on securing, monitoring, and transforming the digital and physical landscapes of our clients. With expertise spanning cybersecurity, surveillance and border security, drone technology, digital forensics and fraud detection, and advanced AI analytics, we deliver integrated solutions that protect, detect, and optimize in real time.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Software Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled Software Engineer to design, develop, and maintain scalable software solutions.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for building high-quality applications, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and ensuring system performance, reliability, and efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain software applications and systems&nbsp;
	Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code&nbsp;
	Collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to define requirements&nbsp;
	Debug, test, and optimize applications for performance and scalability&nbsp;
	Integrate APIs and third-party services where required&nbsp;
	Participate in code reviews and maintain coding standards&nbsp;
	Troubleshoot and resolve software defects and issues&nbsp;
	Contribute to system architecture and technical decision-making&nbsp;


Key Requirements / Expertise


	Strong programming skills (e.g., Python, Java, JavaScript, or similar)&nbsp;
	Solid understanding of software development principles and best practices&nbsp;
	Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git)&nbsp;
	Familiarity with APIs, databases, and system integration&nbsp;
	Knowledge of software testing and debugging techniques&nbsp;
	Understanding of data structures and algorithms&nbsp;


Preferred Qualifications:


	Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field&nbsp;
	Experience with web or mobile application development&nbsp;
	Familiarity with cloud platforms and deployment processes&nbsp;
	Experience working in an agile development environment&nbsp;


Performance Metrics:


	Quality and reliability of code produced&nbsp;
	Timely delivery of assigned tasks and features&nbsp;
	System performance and scalability&nbsp;
	Reduction in bugs and technical issues.


Method of Application
Interested applicants are to send a pdf copy of their curriculum vitae and cover letter to:&nbsp;info@infitechglobalsolutions.com&nbsp;using the the Job Position as subject of email.",

Software Engineer Job at Infitech Global Solutions




        
    

        
        Infitech Global Solutions is a leading information technology company that focuses on securing, monitoring, and transforming the digital and physical landscapes of our clients. With expertise spanning cybersecurity, surveillance and border security, drone technology, digital forensics and fraud detection, and advanced AI analytics, we deliver integrated solutions that protect, detect, and optimize in real time.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a skilled Software Engineer to design, develop, and maintain scalable software solutions.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for building high-quality applications, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and ensuring system performance, reliability, and efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain software applications and systems 
	Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code 
	Collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to define requirements 
	Debug, test, and optimize applications for performance and scalability 
	Integrate APIs and third-party services where required 
	Participate in code reviews and maintain coding standards 
	Troubleshoot and resolve software defects and issues 
	Contribute to system architecture and technical decision-making 


Key Requirements / Expertise


	Strong programming skills (e.g., Python, Java, JavaScript, or similar) 
	Solid understanding of software development principles and best practices 
	Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git) 
	Familiarity with APIs, databases, and system integration 
	Knowledge of software testing and debugging techniques 
	Understanding of data structures and algorithms 


Preferred Qualifications:


	Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field 
	Experience with web or mobile application development 
	Familiarity with cloud platforms and deployment processes 
	Experience working in an agile development environment 


Performance Metrics:


	Quality and reliability of code produced 
	Timely delivery of assigned tasks and features 
	System performance and scalability 
	Reduction in bugs and technical issues.


Method of Application
Interested applicants are to send a pdf copy of their curriculum vitae and cover letter to: [email protected] using the the Job Position as subject of email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Specialist",
  "description": "Krystal Digital is a full service ICT company which specializes in the development, research, deployment and creation of customized and service oriented software applications.

Our organization has a strong competence in providing secure and continuously available Information technology/infrastructure solutions to organizations, institutions and parastatals as required which helps its clients drive efficiency and improve its service delivery.

The company has several notable products; Krystal IT Academy, Central Billing System, iLearnNG and Myskool portal to her credit alongside other non-disclosed works.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse&nbsp;Zone 7, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Specialist will be responsible for creating, implementing, and managing integrated digital campaigns that elevate our brand, engage our target audience,and generate tangible results.
	You will work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure our online efforts are innovative, consistent, and aligned with business objectives.


Key Responsibilities
Strategy &amp; Planning:


	Develop and implement multi-channel digital marketing strategies tailored to business goals.
	Identify target audiences and tailor campaigns to resonate with their needs and preferences.
	Plan and manage content calendars for various digital platforms.


Content Development &amp; Management:


	Create compelling, brand-aligned content (text, graphics, videos) for websites, blogs,social media, and email marketing.
	Collaborate with the design team to produce high-quality visuals and promotional materials.
	Maintain consistency in tone, messaging, and branding across all digital channels.


Social Media Management:


	Manage and grow the company&rsquo;s presence on platforms such as LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and X (Twitter).
	Plan and execute creative campaigns to drive engagement, brand awareness, and community building.
	Respond to audience interactions in a timely and professional manner.


Paid Advertising &amp; Campaign Optimization:


	Set up, monitor, and optimize paid campaigns on Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other relevant platforms.
	Conduct A/B testing to improve click-through rates, conversion rates, and ROI.


Analytics &amp; Reporting:


	Track and analyze KPIs, including reach, engagement, lead generation, and conversions.
	Prepare monthly performance reports with insights and actionable recommendations.
	Use analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite) to monitor trends and optimize strategies.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
	2-4 years of proven experience in a digital marketing role.
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools (Google Analytics, SEO tools, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads, email automation tools).
	Strong copywriting, storytelling, and content creation skills.
	Data-driven mindset with the ability to translate analytics into actionable strategies.
	Ability to manage multiple projects, meet deadlines, and work collaboratively.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@krystalng.com&nbsp;using &#39;&#39;Digital Marketer&quot;as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted, and this is a Hybrid role in Abuja.",

Digital Marketing Specialist Job at Krystal Digital Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Krystal Digital is a full service ICT company which specializes in the development, research, deployment and creation of customized and service oriented software applications.

Our organization has a strong competence in providing secure and continuously available Information technology/infrastructure solutions to organizations, institutions and parastatals as required which helps its clients drive efficiency and improve its service delivery.

The company has several notable products; Krystal IT Academy, Central Billing System, iLearnNG and Myskool portal to her credit alongside other non-disclosed works.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Specialist
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Wuse Zone 7, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Specialist will be responsible for creating, implementing, and managing integrated digital campaigns that elevate our brand, engage our target audience,and generate tangible results.
	You will work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure our online efforts are innovative, consistent, and aligned with business objectives.


Key Responsibilities
Strategy & Planning:


	Develop and implement multi-channel digital marketing strategies tailored to business goals.
	Identify target audiences and tailor campaigns to resonate with their needs and preferences.
	Plan and manage content calendars for various digital platforms.


Content Development & Management:


	Create compelling, brand-aligned content (text, graphics, videos) for websites, blogs,social media, and email marketing.
	Collaborate with the design team to produce high-quality visuals and promotional materials.
	Maintain consistency in tone, messaging, and branding across all digital channels.


Social Media Management:


	Manage and grow the company’s presence on platforms such as LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and X (Twitter).
	Plan and execute creative campaigns to drive engagement, brand awareness, and community building.
	Respond to audience interactions in a timely and professional manner.


Paid Advertising & Campaign Optimization:


	Set up, monitor, and optimize paid campaigns on Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other relevant platforms.
	Conduct A/B testing to improve click-through rates, conversion rates, and ROI.


Analytics & Reporting:


	Track and analyze KPIs, including reach, engagement, lead generation, and conversions.
	Prepare monthly performance reports with insights and actionable recommendations.
	Use analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite) to monitor trends and optimize strategies.


Qualifications & Skills


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
	2-4 years of proven experience in a digital marketing role.
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools (Google Analytics, SEO tools, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads, email automation tools).
	Strong copywriting, storytelling, and content creation skills.
	Data-driven mindset with the ability to translate analytics into actionable strategies.
	Ability to manage multiple projects, meet deadlines, and work collaboratively.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using ''Digital Marketer"as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted, and this is a Hybrid role in Abuja.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content Creator",
  "description": "JV Management Consulting -&nbsp;We are passionate about supporting businesses across Africa in order to help businesses achieve sustainable growth . With a team of experts and a wealth of experience, we specialise in providing innovative management solutions that empower organisations to thrive in today&#39;s dynamic and ever-evolving business landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Content Creator who can translate complex digital, technology, and growth concepts into engaging visual content.
	The ideal candidate understands how to create compelling content that communicates value, drives engagement, and supports business growth objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Create high-quality video content for digital campaigns and brand storytelling
	Edit videos for social media, ads, and marketing funnels
	Develop engaging content around technology, business growth, and digital transformation
	Produce short-form and long-form content for platforms (Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, X)
	Collaborate with marketing and strategy teams to execute content plans
	Handle interviews, client testimonials, and educational content production
	Maintain a clean, professional, and modern editing style


Requirements


	Degree in Media, Film, Multimedia, or related field
	2 &ndash; 4 years of experience in content creation and video editing
	Strong portfolio showcasing digital or brand-focused content
	Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, etc.
	Strong storytelling, visual composition, and editing skills
	Understanding of social media trends and content performance
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, growth-driven environment.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jvmcrecruitment@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Content Creator&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Content Creator Job at JV Management Consulting




        
    

        
        JV Management Consulting - We are passionate about supporting businesses across Africa in order to help businesses achieve sustainable growth . With a team of experts and a wealth of experience, we specialise in providing innovative management solutions that empower organisations to thrive in today's dynamic and ever-evolving business landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Content Creator who can translate complex digital, technology, and growth concepts into engaging visual content.
	The ideal candidate understands how to create compelling content that communicates value, drives engagement, and supports business growth objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Create high-quality video content for digital campaigns and brand storytelling
	Edit videos for social media, ads, and marketing funnels
	Develop engaging content around technology, business growth, and digital transformation
	Produce short-form and long-form content for platforms (Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, X)
	Collaborate with marketing and strategy teams to execute content plans
	Handle interviews, client testimonials, and educational content production
	Maintain a clean, professional, and modern editing style


Requirements


	Degree in Media, Film, Multimedia, or related field
	2 – 4 years of experience in content creation and video editing
	Strong portfolio showcasing digital or brand-focused content
	Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, etc.
	Strong storytelling, visual composition, and editing skills
	Understanding of social media trends and content performance
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, growth-driven environment.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Content Creator" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
